svg.title: Release Plate — Engineering Drawing
svg.text: Release Plate (with Integral Strut and Guide Pins)
59W x 47H x 6D mm plate — PETG — Qty 1 — Tr12x3 2-start trapezoidal thread
1. Material: PETG. Print plate flat on build plate, strut vertical. 4+ perimeter walls, 30%+ infill.
2. Thread: Tr12x3 2-start trapezoidal, 0.3mm radial clearance. Validate with 15-min test print before full part.
3. Layer height: 0.12-0.16mm for threaded sections, 0.20mm for smooth shaft (variable layer height).
4. Bore diameters are constraint-based ranges. Validate with single-bore test prints against physical JG fitting.
5. Tube clearance hole design window: 6.30mm (tube OD) to 6.69mm (collet ID) = 0.39mm total.
6. Guide pins: sand with 400+ grit, apply silicone grease if binding. 0.25mm radial clearance to 6.5mm bushings.
